chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 415 of 2019 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.1545/2019 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.1546/2019 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 10.11.2022 None present for the petitioners. Even on the last date of hearing the matter was adjourned on holding brief on behalf of the Counsel for the petitioners. The petitioners through instant petition seek directions to official respondents for distributing, cancellation of mutation entry in respect of the subject property. The petitioner has adequate remedy under other usual mode of proceedings under Revenue hierarchy, if he is aggrieved by the entry in record of rights, hence, this petition being not maintainable is dismissed accordingly along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
